text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Cafe. I just happen to have finished
developing a drink that will increase your muscle
mass significantly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, those are my thoughts as well. I will not allow you to drink this... no matter how hard you beg.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Okay? Then if you don't need anything, do you
mind leaving?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Well, there goes that plan. I had heard
some people are susceptible to the Caligula
Effect, or a desire to do that which is forbidden...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But from your lack of interest, I see that is not the
case for you. How unfortunate. I shall have to
look elsewhere for a volunteer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well? Are you going or not? Whatever you're
trying to do, it won't work.
